title: Pronephrium rhombeum
taxonomy: Pronephrium rhombeum is classified as a species of fern in the family Davalliaceae. The Davalliaceae family is a small family of ferns that are native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Pronephrium rhombeum is a type of terrestrial fern that is typically found growing in shaded areas with high humidity. The classification of Pronephrium rhombeum is further supported by its unique characteristics, such as its rhombic leaf shape and hairy rachis. As a member of the Davalliaceae family, Pronephrium rhombeum is closely related to other species of ferns in the same family.
